nodes.name: 📁 Google Drive PE Document Trigger
nodes.notes: Monitors PE document folders for new financial documents

nodes.name: 📋 Document Classifier & Validator
nodes.notes: Classifies PE documents and extracts metadata

nodes.name: 🔀 Document Type Router
nodes.notes: Routes documents based on type for specialized processing

nodes.name: 📄 PDF Text Extractor
nodes.notes: Extracts text content from PDF financial documents

nodes.name: 💰 Financial Metrics Parser
nodes.notes: Extracts key financial metrics from document text

nodes.name: 📊 Analysis Data Enricher
nodes.notes: Enriches data with analysis metadata and scoring

nodes.name: 📈 Results Logger (Google Sheets)
nodes.notes: Logs analysis results to Google Sheets dashboard

nodes.name: 📥 General Document Downloader
nodes.notes: Downloads non-financial documents for basic processing

nodes.name: 🔗 Results Merger
nodes.notes: Combines results from different processing paths

nodes.name: ⚡ Priority Filter
nodes.notes: Routes high-priority analyses for immediate notification

nodes.name: 📱 Slack Alert (High Priority)
nodes.notes: Sends immediate alerts for high-value opportunities

nodes.name: 📝 Queue Logger (Low Priority)
nodes.notes: Logs lower priority items to review queue

nodes.name: 🔄 Batch Processor
nodes.notes: Processes documents in batches to manage API limits

nodes.name: ⏱️ Rate Limiter
nodes.notes: Prevents API rate limiting for downstream services

nodes.name: 💾 Results Exporter
nodes.notes: Exports complete analysis results as JSON files
